title: Verification Debt Ledger Entry
description: Minimal external schema for a verification debt ledger JSONL entry. Describes registered verification debt that must not be hidden. An empty or missing ledger is valid — it means no debt is registered. Prototype artifact — not a public release contract.

opened_phase.description: Phase during which the debt was first observed.

category.description: Debt category: pre_existing_tooling_debt, untracked_residue, discovered_verification_gap, etc.

scope.description: Scope of the debt — what file(s) or concern it covers.

owner.description: Who or what domain owns this debt.

status.description: Current status. Closed debt remains in ledger as historical record.

opened_at.description: ISO date when debt was registered.

closed_at.description: ISO date when debt was closed, if closed.

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the classification, closure, or both.

introduced_by_current_phase.description: Whether this debt was introduced by the current phase.

expires_before_phase.description: Phase before which this debt should be resolved.
